security.csp: default-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' https://api.github.com; font-src 'self' data:; img-src 'self' data: https://i.ytimg.com https://img.youtube.com https://*.ytimg.com; media-src 'self' https:; frame-src https://www.youtube.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com
